title: Task: Security Review: Comprehensive Spinr Project Code Review
content:
{
  "id": "ee82fa3d-f83e-4dab-80ff-9bf845df9fd3",
  "title": "Security Review: Comprehensive Spinr Project Code Review",
  "description": "Review security: \n        Perform a comprehensive code review of the entire Spinr ride-sharing platform including:\n        \n        1. Backend (Python/FastAPI):\n           - API endpoints and route handlers\n           - Database queries and Supabase integration\n           - Authentication and authorization\n           - Error handling and validation\n           - Performance optimizations\n        \n        2. Rider App (React Native/Expo):\n           - Component structure and reusability\n           - State management (Zustand stores)\n           - Navigation and routing\n           - API integration\n           - UI/UX consistency\n        \n        3. Driver App (React Native/Expo):\n           - Similar to rider app\n           - Driver-specific features\n        \n        4. Admin Dashboard (Next.js):\n           - Component organization\n           - Data fetching and caching\n           - Authentication flow\n           - UI components\n        \n        5. Security:\n           - Authentication mechanisms\n           - Data protection\n           - API security\n           - Environment variable handling\n        \n        6. Code Quality:\n           - TypeScript usage\n           - Code organization\n           - Naming conventions\n           - Documentation\n        ",
